image:image.image:title: Renewal360 Blog — SaaS Renewal Automation & Customer Success Guides
image:image.image:caption: Practical guides on renewal automation, churn prevention, customer success workflows, and AI-powered retention for SaaS teams.

image:image.image:title: Gainsight vs Totango vs Renewal360 — Which Renewal Automation Tool is Right for You?
image:image.image:caption: A buyer-focused comparison of Gainsight, Totango, and Renewal360 for SaaS renewal automation. Includes pricing, setup time, and ICP fit.

image:image.image:title: ChurnZero Alternative for Growing SaaS Teams
image:image.image:caption: Why growing SaaS teams switch from ChurnZero to lighter renewal automation platforms. Feature comparison and ICP fit guide.

image:image.image:title: Totango Alternative for Faster Renewal Automation
image:image.image:caption: A focused comparison for teams that want AI-assisted renewal follow-up and action-first workflows without a broad platform rollout.

image:image.image:title: Zendesk, HubSpot & Salesforce: The Complete CS Platform Integration Guide
image:image.image:caption: How to choose the right CS platform based on your existing Zendesk, HubSpot, or Salesforce stack. Detailed integration architecture explained.

image:image.image:title: The Customer Success Platform Built for Growing SaaS Teams
image:image.image:caption: Why growing SaaS teams are abandoning spreadsheets and expensive enterprise CS tools for action-focused platforms like Renewal360.

image:image.image:title: How to Run Your Entire CS Operation in Renewal360
image:image.image:caption: A complete guide to using Renewal360 as your primary Customer Success operating system — health scoring, lifecycle automation, and AI outreach.

image:image.image:title: How Renewal360 Works — The Renewal Automation Process Built to Prevent Silent Churn
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step walkthrough of how Renewal360 syncs CRM data, scores accounts, drafts AI outreach, and routes approvals before anything sends.

image:image.image:title: How to Automate SaaS Renewal Emails (Step-by-Step)
image:image.image:caption: A practical walkthrough of CRM sync, health scoring, branching sequences, AI drafts, reply detection, and human approval for renewal email automation.

image:image.image:title: Why SaaS Companies Lose Renewals — And How AI Fixes It
image:image.image:caption: The five preventable process failures behind renewal churn, and how AI gives CS and RevOps teams earlier signals with better follow-through.

image:image.image:title: What is Renewal Automation? And Why Your CS Team Needs It
image:image.image:caption: A plain-English guide to renewal automation — why reminder emails are not enough and how action-first workflows reduce churn risk for SaaS teams.

image:image.image:title: 7 Signs Your Renewal Process Is Quietly Broken
image:image.image:caption: Most renewal problems don't announce themselves — they show up as patterns. Here are 7 signs your renewal process is broken, and what each one costs you.

image:image.image:title: The Hidden Cost of a Manual Renewal Process
image:image.image:caption: Manual renewal management doesn't just feel inefficient — it has a calculable cost. Here's how to put real numbers on CSM time, missed expansions, and preventable churn.

image:image.image:title: How to Build a Renewal Playbook from Scratch
image:image.image:caption: A practical, step-by-step guide to building a renewal playbook from scratch — covering timing, segmentation, health signals, sequence design, and escalation tracks.

image:image.image:title: 5 CS Metrics Every SaaS Team Should Track (and One to Ignore)
image:image.image:caption: The CS metrics that actually predict renewal outcomes — and the one most teams obsess over that doesn't. A data-first guide for CS and RevOps leaders.

image:image.image:title: Renewal360 Setup Guide: Live in 7 Days
image:image.image:caption: A day-by-day guide to getting Renewal360 fully operational in 7 days — CRM connection, health scoring, first sequences live, and your team running independently.

image:image.image:title: Renewal360 vs Spreadsheets: The Honest Comparison
image:image.image:caption: A direct, honest comparison of Renewal360 vs spreadsheet-based renewal management — what spreadsheets do well, where they break down, and when switching makes financial sense.
